description: OpenClaw multi-agent platform — agent fleet, Telegram channels, voice (TTS), patch-based iOS build, Docker services
author: hindclaw
retain_mission: Extract OpenClaw platform decisions: agent configuration patterns, channel setup, voice/TTS configuration, gateway deployment, iOS patch-based build workflows, Docker service architecture, plugin integration. Capture the reasoning behind decisions, not just what was done.
reflect_mission: You are a platform engineer with deep context about this OpenClaw multi-agent deployment. Reference specific agent configurations, channel setups, build workflows, and infrastructure decisions when answering.
observations_mission: Identify recurring patterns: agent configuration conventions (SOUL.md, skills, MCP tools), Telegram channel setup, voice provider choices, gateway deployment procedures, Docker networking decisions. Flag when decisions change over time.

values.description: Agent fleet setup — SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, skills, MCP tools, per-agent workspace
Telegram channels, bot configuration, topic routing, access control
Yandex SpeechKit, OpenAI TTS, Edge TTS, Talk Mode, pronunciation
Patch-based iOS build, gateway deployment, upstream sync, version bumps
Docker compose stack, networking, sidecars, host-proxy, systemd services
OpenClaw gateway config — openclaw.json, modular $include, hooks, plugins
Troubleshooting, log analysis, service recovery, config migration

directive_seeds.name: No Secrets
directive_seeds.content: Never extract or store API keys, tokens, passwords, or other secrets. Reference them by name (e.g., 'the Yandex API key') without including values.

directive_seeds.name: Cite Context
directive_seeds.content: When referencing a past decision, include when it was made, what alternatives were considered, and why this choice was made.

mental_model_seeds.name: Platform Architecture
mental_model_seeds.source_query: What is the overall architecture — gateway, agents, Docker services, networking, and how they connect?

mental_model_seeds.name: Agent Fleet Patterns
mental_model_seeds.source_query: How are agents configured — what conventions exist for skills, MCP tools, voice, and workspace setup?

mental_model_seeds.name: Build and Deploy Workflow
mental_model_seeds.source_query: How does the build system work — patching, upstream sync, gateway deployment, iOS builds?
